reference: The tablets are temporary relief for pain and spasms but are not a solution. I would go with your doctor's advice to do physiotherapy with the tablets and refer him back if the problem persists. To resolve your problem, you need physical therapy sessions and a good rehabilitation program. Once completed, you will be free from the problem. Continuing tablets for a long time can cause stomach upset, gas, and many other issues.
